The death of Old Scratch tavern owner, Nicholas Webster has been reclassified as a murder according to official paperwork filed this week
Though Webster’ death, though his death was initially ruled an accident, the case was recently reopened as a homicide
Sheriff Paul McGinty confirmed a suspect is now in custody in connection with Webster’ death
Cherie Webster, the victim’ widow, has been charged with the murder of her husband

The Sheriff’ Office announced there will be an external enquiry into their handling of the investigation
